name: AI Chat
description: A weather chat assistant powered by TanStack AI with multi-provider support for Netlify.

packageFileDescriptions.src/styles.css: Global styles: Tailwind, highlight.js theme, custom scrollbar, prose/markdown styles for chat UI.
packageFileDescriptions.src/lib/weather-tools.ts: TanStack AI tool definition for getWeather; server implementation returns mock temperature, condition, humidity for a city.
packageFileDescriptions.src/lib/ai-hook.ts: useAIChat hook: useChat with fetchServerSentEvents connection to /api/chat.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/api.chat.ts: POST handler for /api/chat: multi-provider AI (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama) with getWeather tool and SSE streaming.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/index.tsx: Home route: Weather Chat UI with messages list, input form, send/stop, Streamdown markdown rendering.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/__root.tsx: Root layout: HTML shell, Weather Chat header, styles, TanStack Devtools.
